name: Rebels After Dark
summary: Join REB for our late night event of the semester! Free food and activities for all UNLV students.

name: REB General Member Meetings
summary: Join REB for our general member meetings to help plan our future events!

name: Late Night Breakfast
summary: Join REB for the last event of the academic year, Late Night Breakfast filled with lots of free food, giveaways, and activities. Come celebrate finals with us!
